title: 3.1 Litre Oxygen Cylinder
description: Lightweight and portable Non-magnetic High-purity oxygen Refillable
longDescription:
A 3.1-litre oxygen cylinder, often referred to by the brand name Al-Can or as an "OxyKit," is a portable medical-grade oxygen device used for home, travel, and emergency situations.


Key features

  • Lightweight and portable: Made from aluminum, these cylinders are significantly lighter than traditional steel oxygen cylinders, weighing around 3–4 kg. This makes them easy to carry using a shoulder bag.
  • Refillable: Most models are designed to be refilled by certified oxygen manufacturers or dealers.
  • Typical duration: A 3.1-litre cylinder can provide approximately 3 to 3.25 hours of oxygen at a flow rate of 2 litres per minute (LPM).
  • Complete kits: The cylinders are often sold as part of a kit that includes a valve, pressure gauge, flowmeter, humidifier bottle, nasal mask, and a carry bag.
  • Regulatory approval: In India, many such cylinders and their valves are approved by the Petroleum and Explosives Safety Organisation (PESO) for medical use.
